name: BioSpark Quantum Modules
description: The canonical Genesis Container for the BioSpark Quantum Engine. Contains all 16 Quantum Modules organized into 4 departments — WorldConstruction, EntitySystems, NarrativeSystems, PipelineSystems — each with 16 sub-module Containers and 16 atomic Capsule parameters. This is the base component library from which all Quantum applications are assembled.

seedAnswers.question: What is the primary domain of this Genesis Container?
seedAnswers.answer: Software — a component module library for the BioSpark Quantum Engine

seedAnswers.question: What is the capacity law governing this container?
seedAnswers.answer: 16 Modules × 16 Sub-Modules × 16 Capsules = 4096 total atomic parameters

seedAnswers.question: Who is the issuing authority?
seedAnswers.answer: BioSpark Studios — Phantori (Jeremy Dickinson), Founder and Creative Director

mythos.name: Terrain
mythos.description: The spatial foundation layer. Generates, maps, and manages terrain geometry, hex-grid topology, elevation fields, and world-origin anchoring. All spatial data in the system originates here.
